## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance reporting, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Looker Studio performance report implemented, offering detailed insights on SEO metrics and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [15 new content pieces published last Friday; 16 articles ready for review and 26 new topics pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Plan to expedite content production process, aiming for 15-20 articles per week with streamlined image creation](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Focus on AI agents content while balancing core topics (APM, automated campaigns, clicks to cash)](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Topics

### New Performance Reporting System

  - [Switched to Looker Studio for performance reports](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Includes week-over-week metrics from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Google Analytics 4 data with conversion rates and engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Query data from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic page showing traffic from ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Anthony noted Looker Studio's complexity; Aida suggested using ChatGPT for troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Updates and Strategy

  - [15 pieces published last Friday; impact not yet reflected in current report](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [16 articles ready for review; 26 new topics pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Many new topics related to recently launched AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Anthony to review and approve all topics and produced content today](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Plan to create next 50 topics to expedite content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Balance focus between AI agents and core topics (APM, automated campaigns, clicks to cash)](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Image Creation Process

  - [Exploring template approach for faster image generation](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [CTO (Daniel) working on Airtable flow to auto-generate images based on articles and brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Anthony open to GrowthX team's suggestions; prioritizes brand alignment and SEO compliance](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Aida noted AI-generated images are improving, better than Midjourney](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Content Pruning and Optimization

  - [Jakub to analyze SEMrush data for underperforming blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Plan to remove outdated content and consolidate thin content](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Anthony requested top 10 underperforming posts to remove immediately](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Strategy aims to improve crawlability and overall site performance](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Emerging AI Tools

  - [Anthony mentioned "Manus," a new general AI tool for task execution](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Invitation-only access; detailed use case required for application](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to explore and potentially test new AI tool "Manus"](https://fathom.video/share/emdaFd2znWQSrLqskTmhhmyD2DxshUtm?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
